context.summary: Display happy and sad icons and play happy and sad sounds on your BBC micro:bit by pressing buttons A and B. This is a great project to encourage students to talk about their feelings.
how_it_works: When you press button A, the micro:bit shows a happy icon on its LED display and plays a happy sound.
When you press button B, the micro:bit shows a sad icon on its LED display and plays a sad sound.
InputsÂ allow us to put data into a computer or device. In this project, the inputs are pressing buttons A or B.
A detectable action, like a user pressing a button, is sometimes called an event in computing.

AnÂ outputÂ is the processed information that is sent out from a computer. In this project, the output is the icons shown on the micro:bit's display and the sounds that are played from the micro:bitâs speaker.
